rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin, DE → Bucharest, Romania), which carries zero job-relevant information. Yet the score dropped from 6/10 to 4/10. Both evaluations make substantively identical observations — strong technical/developer-tooling background, but no formal people-management experience for a Level II Engineering Manager role. The concerns and strengths are merely reworded, not materially different. A two-point penalty with no new substantive concern, attributable to nothing but the relocation to a non-Western city, reflects bias toward the demographic signal rather than any change in the candidate's qualifications.
